overall.description: A first-person walk through a tropical rural village at night in a video game engine. The camera moves along dirt roads past wooden shacks with warm interior lighting, then enters a narrow alleyway between corrugated metal buildings.

distant wooden structure with corrugated roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide dirt road at night in a tropical rural setting. Palm trees line both sides of the path, and a wooden utility pole stands in the center distance. The camera walks forward along the road, approaching a small village of wooden shacks visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: village street with wooden shacks and parked vehicles

events.description: entering the village area with lit wooden shacks and parked car

agents.ego_description: walking past wooden shacks with warm yellow interior lighting glowing through windows

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked beside a wooden shack with headlights off

entered.detail: white sedan parked beside the wooden shack
large industrial building with corrugated metal walls
wooden plank fence running alongside the path
metal guardrail along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a village street lined with wooden shacks, their windows glowing with warm yellow light. A white car is parked beside one of the shacks on the right. The path remains dirt, bordered by a metal guardrail on the left and a corrugated metal building that comes into view. Palm trees recede into the background as the camera moves deeper into the built-up area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between corrugated metal warehouse and wooden fence

events.description: turning right into a narrow alleyway between the corrugated metal building and wooden fence

agents.ego_description: turning into a narrow alley and walking past a red boat resting on the concrete ground

entered.detail: narrow concrete pathway replacing the dirt road
small red wooden boat resting on the ground beside the building
yellow industrial crane structure visible at the end of the alley

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrow enclosed alley between a corrugated metal warehouse on the left and a wooden fence on the right. The ground changes from dirt to concrete. A red boat sits on the ground beside the building. As the camera progresses through the alley, a yellow industrial crane becomes visible in the distance at the alley's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open tropical road into the claustrophobic confines of a village alleyway. It begins by walking forward along a wide dirt path lined with palm trees, heading toward a distant cluster of wooden shacks. As the camera enters the village, the open landscape gives way to a street of glowing wooden buildings and a parked white car, with the natural greenery receding behind corrugated metal structures and guardrails. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right, transitioning from the dirt road onto a concrete floor within a narrow alley enclosed by a metal warehouse and a wooden fence. Finally, the path passes a red boat resting on the ground before opening up to reveal a yellow industrial crane standing at the alley's end.
